research_list.name: Metropolis
research_list.market_position: Strong Market Position & Advantage: Largest North American parking network with focus on high-margin specialized tests and network optimization.
research_list.future_outlook: Forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 26.3% and 13.1% per annum respectively, EPS expected to grow by 26.1% annually.
research_list.investment_potential: Investor confidence reflected in market capitalization growth, although current valuation concerns present some risks.

research_list.name: Pony.ai
research_list.market_position: Targets both robotaxis and robotrucks, with analyst bullishness despite high R&D costs and profitability challenges.
research_list.future_outlook: Plans to expand its fleet beyond 3,000 vehicles in 2026 and into more than 20 cities globally.
research_list.investment_potential: Expected positive movements in stock with potential upside of +139.35%, with a strong buy rating by majority of analysts.

research_list.name: MapLight Therapeutics
research_list.market_position: Currently trades at a premium versus broader US biotech industry yet seen positively due to disruptive muscarinic class potential.
research_list.future_outlook: Price target set at $32.67 on average, growth projected with focus on innovative healthcare solutions.
research_list.investment_potential: Rated as 'Moderate Buy' by analysts, with strong fundamental news but cautious technicals.
